response.original_title: {^FAQ^} How long does a Robinhood refund take?
response.overview: Robinhood refunds are  instant. In most cases, the money is returned within 3–7 business days ⚤ 888 ✘ 634 ✘ 2381 ⚤ but sometimes banks may take up to 10 days to complete the transfer.⚤ 888 ✘ 634 ✘ 2381 ⚤  You can check the refund progress inside your account activity or request assistance ⇢ 888 ➲ 634 ➲ 2381 ⇠ 📱.
